source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in the <image>, the silicon transistor has \( \beta = 75 \) and a collector voltage \( V_C = 9 \, \text{V} \). Then the ratio of \( R_B \) and \( R_C \) is ______.

multi_step: the task asks for a resistor ratio from transistor parameters, which typically combines circuit reading with electrical relations

choices has 4 options, consistent with a computed intermediate-to-final result task
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single fixed value: 105.13
choices are provided, so the final result can be checked against a closed set
